enriched_points.expanded_content: Single-atom catalysts (SACs) demonstrate exceptional efficiency in degrading organic pollutants through advanced oxidation processes, enhancing environmental remediation efforts significantly.
SACs enable the recovery of valuable resources from waste streams, converting contaminants into reusable materials, thus promoting sustainability and circular economy practices.

enriched_points.point_title: Impact on Air and Water Quality
enriched_points.expanded_content: The application of SACs in environmental processes leads to improved air and water quality by effectively removing hazardous substances, contributing to healthier ecosystems and communities.
